title: ‘I get $1,460 in Social Security’: My millionaire ex-husband, 74, refuses to pay alimony. What can I do?
summary: A woman receiving $1,460 monthly in Social Security faces financial hardship while her millionaire ex-husband with millions in assets refuses to pay alimony. She seeks legal advice on recourse to address the financial disparity.
content: “I have very little money, while my ex’s financial statements show assets in the millions.”

zh.title: "我每月获得1460美元社会保障"：我的百万富翁前夫（74岁）拒绝支付赡养费。我该怎么办？
zh.summary: 一名每月获得1460美元社会保障的女性面临财务困难，而她拥有数百万资产的百万富翁前夫拒绝支付赡养费。她寻求法律建议以应对这种财务差异。

title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
summary: A man who delayed claiming Social Security until 70 died from cancer after receiving only one payment, raising questions about the wisdom of delaying benefits. The case illustrates the mortality risk in deferring retirement income for potentially higher future benefits.
content: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”

zh.title: "这真令人心碎"：我的哥哥在70岁时申请了社会保障金，在只收到一次付款后因癌症去世了。为什么要等着申领呢?
zh.summary: 一名延迟至70岁才申请社会保障金的男子在只收到一次付款后因癌症去世，这引发了人们对延迟申领福利明智性的质疑。这个案例说明了为了换取潜在更高未来福利而延迟领取退休收入所带来的死亡风险。

title: Typhoon Bavi makes landfall in eastern China's Taizhou after nearly 2 million evacuated
summary: Typhoon Bavi made landfall in coastal Taizhou, eastern China, following a massive evacuation of nearly 2 million residents. The large-scale evacuation demonstrates the region's disaster preparedness in response to severe weather threats.
content: Typhoon Bavi made landfall late on Saturday in the coastal city of Taizhou in eastern China, where nearly 2 million people were evacuated,

zh.title: 台风巴维在近200万人疏散后在中国东部台州登陆
zh.summary: 台风巴维在近200万名居民大规模疏散后在中国东部沿海城市台州登陆。大规模疏散表明该地区在面对严重天气威胁时的防灾准备就绪情况。

title: The volatile AI trade marched higher, but oil kept Wall Street on edge last week
summary: AI-related stocks, including chip companies and Meta, surged during a volatile trading week, while oil prices created broader market uncertainty. The divergence highlights how concentrated sector momentum can drive overall market performance despite headwinds.
content: Chip stocks had a wild but strong week. Meta led our portfolio higher.

zh.title: 波动的AI交易走高，但石油上周让华尔街保持警惕
zh.summary: 包括芯片公司和Meta在内的AI相关股票在波动的交易周期间暴涨，而油价造成了更广泛的市场不确定性。这种分歧突显了集中的行业势头如何在逆风中推动整体市场表现。

title: Your data built the AI boom — but Big Tech is pocketing 100% of the equity
summary: The article argues that user data has been fundamental to AI development, yet tech companies retain all economic gains from the boom. It proposes mechanisms for individuals to reclaim their rightful share of AI-generated wealth.
content: Your share of the AI wealth is a right — not a handout. Here is how we claw back our money.

zh.title: 你的数据造就了AI热潮——但科技巨头独吞100%的收益
zh.summary: 该文章认为用户数据对AI发展至关重要，但科技公司却保留了AI热潮带来的所有经济收益。文章提出了让个人重新获得AI财富应有份额的机制。

title: Only 5% of U.S. adults can ace this 8-question financial-literacy test. Can you?
summary: Only 5% of U.S. adults passed an 8-question financial literacy test, reflecting a 10-year low in financial knowledge. The declining literacy has measurable negative consequences for household savings and personal finances.
content: Financial literacy just hit a 10-year low — and it is devastating bank accounts.

zh.title: 只有5%的美国成年人能通过这个8道题的金融知识测试。你能吗？
zh.summary: 只有5%的美国成年人通过了一份8道题的金融知识测试，反映出过去10年来金融知识水平创新低。金融知识下降对家庭储蓄和个人财务造成了可衡量的负面影响。

title: You want a portfolio that matches your morals. Your retirement plan might disagree.
summary: More investors want portfolios aligned with their personal values, but retirement plans often lack support for customized socially responsible investing. The gap between investor preferences and plan options complicates values-based investing strategies.
content: More investors want their money to reflect their values. It feels righteous — but the reality is a lot messier.

zh.title: 你想要一份符合你价值观的投资组合。但你的退休计划可能会反对。
zh.summary: 越来越多投资者想要与个人价值观相符的投资组合，但退休计划通常缺乏对定制化社会责任投资的支持。投资者偏好与计划选项之间的差距使基于价值观的投资策略变得复杂。

title: Stocks rally when Congress goes on summer break. Here’s why.
summary: Stock markets historically perform better during Congressional recesses because legislative activity creates regulatory uncertainty and increased volatility. The pattern demonstrates how political calendar events influence market dynamics.
content: Stock prices face greater volatility when lawmakers are active, driven entirely by the regulatory uncertainty they create.

zh.title: 国会放暑假时股市上涨。原因在这里。
zh.summary: 股票市场在国会休会期间历史表现更佳，因为立法活动会造成监管不确定性和波动率增加。这一模式展示了政治日历事件如何影响市场动态。

title: Your investing expectations are more than double the reality. Here is the tough truth.
summary: Investor expectations for annual returns often exceed 10%, but historical data shows such results are exceedingly rare over the long term. Realistic return assumptions are essential for sound investment planning and retirement preparation.
content: Long-term real returns above 10% annualized are exceedingly rare.

zh.title: 你的投资预期是现实的两倍多。这是残酷的真相。
zh.summary: 投资者对年回报的预期通常超过10%，但历史数据表明这样的结果在长期内极其罕见。现实的回报预期对稳健的投资规划和退休准备至关重要。

title: The dot-com crash was a $5 trillion blip. Why the next financial crisis could hit 4 times harder.
summary: Analysis warns that the next global financial crisis is already underway and could be four times more severe than the $5 trillion dot-com crash. The forecast outlines how the crisis may unfold in coming months.
content: The next global financial crisis is already under way. Here is how it will unfold.

zh.title: 互联网泡沫破裂是5万亿美元的小挫折。为什么下一次金融危机的冲击可能是它的4倍？
zh.summary: 分析警告下一次全球金融危机已经开始，可能比5万亿美元的互联网泡沫破裂严重四倍。预测概述了危机可能在未来几个月如何展开。

title: These underperforming trades could yield big returns over next six months
summary: Analyst Mike Akins recommends increasing exposure to underperforming sectors that have lagged the AI stock rally. This rotation strategy positions investors to capture gains as market leadership potentially shifts away from concentrated AI stocks.
content: ETF Action's Mike Akins is encouraging investors to boost exposure to groups that underperformed compared with major artificial intelligence stocks.

zh.title: 这些表现不佳的交易可能在未来六个月产生巨大回报
zh.summary: 分析师Mike Akins建议增加对表现不佳行业的敞口，这些行业在AI股票涨势中落后。这种轮换策略使投资者能够在市场领导力可能从集中的AI股票转移时获取收益。

title: Trump Accounts: Who is eligible, how $1,000 deposits work and how to open one
summary: Trump Accounts launched in July as a new tax-deferred investment vehicle for children with $1,000 deposit minimums. The offering expands the range of accounts available for youth-focused long-term investing.
content: Trump Accounts officially launched in July, introducing a new tax-deferred investing option for children. Here are the key features.

zh.title: 特朗普账户：谁有资格、1000美元存款如何运作以及如何开户
zh.summary: 特朗普账户于7月推出，作为为儿童提供的新型延税投资工具，最低存款为1000美元。该产品扩展了为青少年长期投资提供的账户范围。

title: While Musk's Neuralink drills into skulls, China's BrainCo bets the future of brain tech is wearable
summary: While Neuralink pursues invasive brain implants, Chinese firm BrainCo is developing wearable brain-computer interfaces as an alternative. Both approaches compete to address neural disabilities, reflecting divergent strategies in emerging brain-tech markets.
content: Interest in brain-computer interfaces is rising as it promises to help people with compromised neural abilities.

zh.title: 当马斯克的Neuralink钻颅骨时，中国BrainCo押注脑技术的未来是可穿戴的
zh.summary: Neuralink追求侵入式脑植入，而中国公司BrainCo正在开发可穿戴脑机接口作为替代方案。两种方法都在争夺解决神经残障的机会，反映了新兴脑技术市场中的不同策略。

title: New housing law targets affordability — what it means for homebuyers and sellers
summary: New housing legislation aims to improve affordability for buyers and sellers, though experts caution that market benefits will take considerable time to materialize. The law represents a policy response to persistent housing cost challenges.
content: While the legislation is aimed at least partly at addressing affordability, experts say the benefits of the measure will take time to show up in the market.

zh.title: 新住房法针对可负担性——对购房者和卖家的影响
zh.summary: 新住房法旨在改善购房者和卖家的可负担性，但专家警告市场效益需要相当长的时间才能实现。该法律代表了对持续住房成本挑战的政策回应。

title: Berkshire Hathaway gains ground, but still trails the S&P 500 as '26 enters second half
summary: Berkshire Hathaway B shares are down 1.8% year-to-date and trailing the S&P 500 by 12.4 percentage points, which has gained 10.7% in the first half of 2026. The underperformance reflects Warren Buffett's cautious investment stance relative to the broader market rally.
content: With 2026 a bit more than half over, Berkshire Hathaway's B shares are down 1.8% year-to-date and 12.4 percentage points behind the S&P 500's 10.7% gain.

zh.title: 伯克希尔哈撒韦领先，但仍落后标普500
zh.summary: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦B股今年迄今下跌1.8%，落后标普500指数12.4个百分点，后者在2026年上半年上涨10.7%。相对于更广泛的市场反弹，这种表现不佳反映了沃伦·巴菲特谨慎的投资立场。

title: From booksmaxxing to looksmaxxing: Why the viral trends concern some mental health experts
summary: "Maxxing" has become a pervasive social media trend where people obsessively optimize fitness, skincare, diet, and other life aspects. Mental health experts are raising concerns about the psychological toll of this extreme self-optimization culture on users.
content: People are self-optimizing everything — protein, skincare, fitness — to such a degree that "maxxing" is one of social media's most popular suffixes.

zh.title: 从阅读最大化到外表最大化：为什么这些病毒式趋势令心理健康专家担忧
zh.summary: "最大化"已成为一种普遍的社交媒体趋势，人们疯狂地优化健身、护肤、饮食和其他生活方面。心理健康专家对这种极端自我优化文化对用户的心理影响提出了担忧。

title: Bank of America says these stocks are a buy heading into earnings
summary: Bank of America has identified a curated list of stocks positioned favorably ahead of upcoming quarterly earnings reports. The recommendations suggest potential trading opportunities for investors in the near term.
content: Bank of America named a slew of stocks that are best positioned heading into quarterly reports.

zh.title: 美国银行表示这些股票在进入财报季时值得购买
zh.summary: 美国银行已确定了在即将到来的季度财报前景良好的精选股票清单。这些建议表明投资者在短期内有潜在的交易机会。

title: The best states to live in for 2026: No. 1 has a six-year winning streak
summary: A 2026 ranking identifies the nation's best places to live, with the top state maintaining its position for six consecutive years. The ranking reflects how return-to-office mandates and declining remote work are influencing corporate decisions about office locations and quality of life.
content: Return to office mandates and a decline in remote work have companies looking more closely at the quality of life in the place where they establish offices.

zh.title: 2026年最适合居住的州：第一名连续六年保持领先
zh.summary: 2026年排名确定了全国最佳居住地，排名第一的州保持了连续六年的领先地位。该排名反映了回办公室工作任务和远程工作下降如何影响公司对办公地点和生活质量的决策。

title: These are America’s 10 worst states to live in for 2026
summary: America's 10 worst states for 2026 are rated on factors including cost of living, crime rates, healthcare access, and regulation. While some states offer low expenses and light regulation, they often suffer from high crime and inadequate healthcare services.
content: Some states may have low costs and light regulation, but high crime and lack of healthcare are among important factors when people choose where to live.

zh.title: 这些是美国2026年最糟糕的10个居住州
zh.summary: 美国2026年最糟糕的10个州根据生活成本、犯罪率、医疗保健获取和监管等因素进行评级。虽然一些州提供低支出和宽松的监管，但它们经常面临高犯罪率和不充分的医疗保健服务。

title: Ferrari has recovered from its Luce-unveil slump. Why the stock is still underappreciated
summary: Ferrari shares have recovered 17% since dropping after the market rejected its new Luce model. Two major investment banks maintain buy ratings, suggesting the luxury automaker's stock still has significant upside potential.
content: Ferrari shares are up 17% since falling after unveiling its panned Luce model. Two banks still see more potential in the stock.

zh.title: 法拉利从卢切模型发布低迷中恢复。为什么股票仍被低估
zh.summary: 在市场拒绝其新卢切模型后下跌以来，法拉利股票已恢复17%。两家主要投资银行维持买入评级，表明这家豪华汽车制造商的股票仍然具有显著的上涨潜力。

title: Trump threatens to 'decimate' Iran if it tries to kill him, as Treasury sanctions alleged Iranian financier
summary: President Trump declared that over 1,000 missiles are "locked and loaded" for Iran if it attempts to assassinate him, amid alleged Iranian threats. The U.S. Treasury simultaneously sanctioned an alleged Iranian financier believed to be financing the alleged plot.
content: Trump says 1,000 missiles are "locked and loaded" and will hit Iran if it carries out its threats to assassinate the U.S. president.

zh.title: 特朗普威胁若伊朗欲杀害他将"摧毁"伊朗，财政部制裁涉嫌伊朗融资人
zh.summary: 美国总统特朗普宣布，如果伊朗试图暗杀他，超过1000枚导弹已"锁定装弹"。与此同时，美国财政部对被认为资助该谋杀阴谋的一名伊朗融资人实施了制裁。

title: 'Funflation' hits home: Why staying in isn't the cost-saver it used to be
summary: Rising prices across streaming services, video games, and in-home entertainment have made staying home less affordable than before, a phenomenon termed "funflation." The trend highlights how inflation has reached previously inexpensive leisure activities.
content: Following a wave of price hikes, at-home pastimes like streaming movies or playing video games are pinching pocketbooks.

zh.title: "娱乐通胀"来袭：为何居家不再省钱
zh.summary: 流媒体服务、视频游戏和居家娱乐的价格上升使得待在家里变得不如以往经济划算，这一现象被称为"娱乐通胀"。该趋势突显通货膨胀已蔓延至曾经廉价的休闲娱乐活动。

title: New York Times reporters are subpoenaed after Air Force One reporting, newspaper says
summary: The Trump administration subpoenaed New York Times journalists following their reporting on security vulnerabilities in the new Air Force One aircraft. The action represents escalated government scrutiny of press coverage involving sensitive national security matters.
content: The Trump administration issued subpoenas to several journalists after its report on security concerns involving the new Air Force One, according to the paper.

zh.title: 纽约时报称其记者因空军一号报道遭传唤
zh.summary: 特朗普政府因纽约时报记者关于新空军一号飞机安全漏洞的报道对其进行了传唤。这一行动代表政府对涉及敏感国家安全事项的新闻报道的审查升级。

title: ‘Day-to-day dread’ haunts frustrated job seekers in era of low hiring. When will it end?
summary: American job seekers report persistent anxiety and difficulty finding work despite historically low unemployment, a disconnect highlighting the challenges of the current labor market. This "day-to-day dread" reflects a mismatch between macroeconomic indicators and individual employment experiences.
content: Finding a job was easy a few years ago. Now, Americans are worried about their job prospects, even though the unemployment rate is historically low.

zh.title: "每日的恐惧"困扰低招聘时代中感到沮丧的求职者。何时才会结束？
zh.summary: 美国求职者报告持续的焦虑和尽管失业率历史上处于低位但仍难以找到工作，这种不匹配突出了当前劳动力市场的挑战。这种"每日的恐惧"反映了宏观经济指标与个人就业经验之间的脱节。

title: Reeves tells BBC: Burnham needs worked-through plan to govern from the start
summary: UK Chancellor Rachel Reeves tells the BBC that incoming Prime Minister Andy Burnham will need a fully worked-through governing plan from day one. Reeves notes she is handing over a stable economy to the new administration.
content: The Chancellor tells Laura Kuenssberg she will be handing over a stable economy to the incoming PM.

zh.title: 里夫斯告诉BBC：伯纳姆需要一份完整的执政计划从一开始就实施
zh.summary: 英国财政大臣蕾切尔·里夫斯告诉BBC，即将上任的首相安迪·伯纳姆需要从第一天开始制定一份完整的执政计划。里夫斯指出，她正在将一个稳定的经济交给新政府。

title: Burnout, frustration and heartbreak: Amazon layoffs take their toll in saturated job market
summary: Over eight months after announcing its largest-ever layoffs, Amazon's former employees continue struggling to secure new positions in an increasingly saturated job market. The affected workers report burnout, frustration, and significant emotional and financial hardship.
content: In the eight-plus months since Amazon announced its most expansive job cuts ever, laid off workers have been thrust into an increasingly saturated labor market.

zh.title: 疲惫、沮丧和心碎：亚马逊裁员在饱和就业市场中造成的影响
zh.summary: 在宣布历史上最大规模的裁员八个多月后，亚马逊前员工仍在努力在日益饱和的就业市场中争取新职位。受影响的员工报告称存在疲惫、沮丧以及重大的情感和经济困难。

title: A tiny GLP-1 implant is the latest bet to help patients maintain their weight loss
summary: Vivani Medical is developing a subdermal implant containing semaglutide, the active ingredient in Novo Nordisk's Wegovy and Ozempic medications. This innovation aims to provide long-term weight loss maintenance and diabetes management through a minimally invasive delivery method.
content: Vivani Medical is developing an implant of semaglutide, the active ingredient in Novo Nordisk's obesity injection Wegovy and diabetes counterpart Ozempic.

zh.title: 微型GLP-1植入物是帮助患者维持体重减轻的最新尝试
zh.summary: Vivani Medical公司正在开发一种含有司美格鲁肽的皮下植入物，司美格鲁肽是诺和诺德公司Wegovy和Ozempic药物的活性成分。这项创新旨在通过最小侵入性递送方法提供长期体重减轻维持和糖尿病管理。

title: Regular water is no longer enough. Welcome to the corporate gold rush around ‘functional hydration.’
summary: Companies are rushing to capitalize on growing demand for "functional hydration" products, including electrolyte mixes and enhanced beverages, driven by social media trends and GLP-1 drug popularity. The trend represents a corporate pivot to market hydration as a specialized wellness category.
content: Social media and GLP-1s are spurring increased interest in hydration products, and companies are responding with things like electrolyte mixes and “hydrating hot chocolate.”

zh.title: 普通水不再足够。欢迎来到围绕"功能性补水"的企业淘金热
zh.summary: 公司们争相抓住对"功能性补水"产品日益增长的需求，包括电解质混合物和强化饮料，这由社交媒体趋势和GLP-1药物的流行所驱动。这一趋势代表了企业将补水市场化为专门健康类别的战略转向。

title: The U.S. stock market is becoming ‘too big to fail’
summary: The U.S. stock market has become so large and economically significant that prolonged bear markets may now be structurally unlikely. This shift reflects how central equity markets are to modern economic stability and government support mechanisms.
content: Why protracted bear markets may be a thing of the past.

zh.title: 美国股市正成为"太大而不能倒闭"
zh.summary: 美国股市已变得如此庞大和在经济上如此重要，以至于长期熊市现在在结构上可能不太可能发生。这一转变反映了股票市场对现代经济稳定性和政府支持机制的中心重要性。

title: Fed Chair Warsh will be in the hot seat as lawmakers press for his read on the economy
summary: Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh will testify before Congress this week for the first time in his role, with lawmakers seeking his assessment of current economic conditions. The hearing provides a key opportunity to question Fed leadership on monetary policy direction.
content: Kevin Warsh will testify before Congress for the first time as Fed chair this week. Lawmakers will want answers.

zh.title: 美联储主席沃什将面临立法者关于经济前景的严峻质询
zh.summary: 美联储主席凯文·沃什将在本周首次在其任期内向国会作证，立法者们寻求他对当前经济状况的评估。这次听证会为质询美联储领导层关于货币政策方向提供了关键机会。

title: Will Trump Accounts deliver for American children?
summary: The White House is promoting Trump Accounts as a way to give new generations a stake in the American dream, positioning it as a major economic initiative. However, the scheme faces criticism from skeptics questioning its viability and impact. The debate centers on whether this investment vehicle can effectively help younger Americans build wealth.
content: The White House has hailed the project as giving new generations a stake in the American dream, but the scheme has its critics.

zh.title: 特朗普账户能为美国儿童提供帮助吗？
zh.summary: 白宫正在推广特朗普账户，将其作为给新一代提供美国梦一份的方式，并将其定位为重大经济举措。然而，该计划面临持怀疑态度批评者的质疑，他们对其可行性和影响提出了质问。辩论的核心是这种投资工具是否能够有效帮助美国年轻人积累财富。

title: 'We've saved 34 tonnes of food and a carpet'
summary: Two community groups report record attendance at their programs, which have diverted 34 tonnes of food and various items from waste. These initiatives demonstrate growing community interest in sustainability and resource sharing. The items given away highlight how community programs can reduce waste while meeting local needs.
content: Two community groups say they have welcomed "record attendances" and given away many 'random items".

zh.title: '我们节省了34吨食物和一条地毯'
zh.summary: 两个社区团体报告其计划创下创纪录的参与人数，这些计划从废物流中转移了34吨食物和各种物品。这些举措表明了社区对可持续性和资源共享的日益浓厚兴趣。所捐赠的物品突出了社区计划在减少浪费的同时满足当地需求的方式。

title: AstraZeneca's trial flop raises a bigger question: Is its pipeline premium becoming more vulnerable?
summary: AstraZeneca has experienced a trial failure that raises questions about the durability of its premium valuation in the European pharmaceutical sector. The company's high valuation has historically been justified by a track record of delivering successful drug development results. This setback suggests investors may need to reassess their confidence in AstraZeneca's pipeline and future profitability.
content: For years, AstraZeneca has commanded one of the richest valuations among large European pharma companies on the assumption that it consistently delivers results.

zh.title: 阿斯利康的试验失败提出了一个更大的问题：其管道溢价变得更加脆弱吗？
zh.summary: 阿斯利康经历了一次试验失败，这引发了对其在欧洲制药部门的溢价估值耐久性的质疑。该公司的高估值在历史上一直由成功的药物开发成果来支撑。这一挫折表明投资者可能需要重新评估对阿斯利康管道和未来盈利能力的信心。

title: UAE defense firm EDGE Group wants to turn homegrown military tech into a global business
summary: UAE defense contractor EDGE Group is pursuing global expansion of its domestically developed military technology and manufacturing capabilities. The effort reflects the UAE's strategic goal to build a globally competitive defense industry and export sector.
content: EDGE Group CEO Hamad Al Marar discusses the UAE’s push to build a globally competitive defense industry — and how technology, manufacturing and exports are shaping that ambition.

zh.title: 阿联酋防务公司EDGE集团希望将自主研发军事技术转变为全球业务
zh.summary: 阿联酋防务承包商EDGE集团正在追求其自主开发的军事技术和制造能力的全球扩展。这一努力反映了阿联酋建设全球竞争力的国防工业和出口部门的战略目标。

title: Apple sues OpenAI alleging trade secret theft, says scheme was 'at every level'
summary: Apple has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging the company stole trade secrets through a scheme operating "at every level." The lawsuit follows Apple and OpenAI's 2024 partnership integrating ChatGPT into iPhone's operating system.
content: The two companies entered into a high-profile partnership in 2024 when ChatGPT was integrated into the iPhone's operating system.

zh.title: 苹果起诉OpenAI窃取商业机密，称计划"无处不在"
zh.summary: 苹果已对OpenAI提起诉讼，指控该公司通过一项"无处不在"的计划窃取商业机密。此诉讼源于苹果和OpenAI的2024年合作，将ChatGPT整合到iPhone的操作系统中。
